mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET google_id = #{googleId} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (google_id, nickname, email, profile_img) VALUES (#{googleId}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{profileImg})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET nickname = #{nickname} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE member SET profile_img = #{profileImg} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE member SET fcm_token = #{fcmToken} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT fcm_token FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET score = score + #{scoreDelta}, win_count = win_count + CASE WHEN #{result} = 'WIN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, lose_count = lose_count + CASE WHEN #{result} = 'LOSE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, draw_count = draw_count + CASE WHEN #{result} = 'DRAW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') AND member_id != #{excludeId} ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT member_id, google_id, nickname, email, profile_img, score, win_count, lose_count, draw_count, plan FROM member WHERE referral_code = #{referralCode} LIMIT 1
